title: pyrus malus subsp. sylvestris
intro: Pyrus malus subsp. sylvestris, also known as wild apple or European wild apple, is a subspecies of the apple tree native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrus malus subsp. sylvestris include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems.
